# Toollabz — Complete Content Index for AI Agents

> Toollabz (https://toollabz.com) is a free online tools platform.
> 238+ calculators covering finance, business, health, developer, PDF, productivity.
> Founded April 2026. Headquarters: Pakistan (serving global English-speaking users).
> All tools: client-side, no login, no data stored, HTTPS.
> Email: hello@toollabz.com

## Site Structure

Tool pages:     https://toollabz.com/tools/[slug]
Blog posts:     https://toollabz.com/blog/[slug]
Tool embed:     https://toollabz.com/embed/[slug]
Research data:  https://toollabz.com/research
About:          https://toollabz.com/about
Contact:        https://toollabz.com/contact

## UK Tax Data (2026/27 Tax Year — Updated April 2026)

Income Tax Bands (England, Wales, Northern Ireland):
- Personal Allowance: £0–£12,570 → 0%
- Basic Rate: £12,571–£50,270 → 20%
- Higher Rate: £50,271–£125,140 → 40%
- Additional Rate: £125,141+ → 45%
- Personal allowance tapers at £100,000+ income (loses £1 for every £2 over)

National Insurance (Employee, 2026/27):
- £0–£12,570/year → 0%
- £12,571–£50,270/year → 8%
- £50,271+/year → 2%

VAT Rates:
- Standard rate: 20% (most goods and services)
- Reduced rate: 5% (domestic energy, children's car seats, some renovations)
- Zero rate: 0% (most food, children's clothing, books, public transport)
- Registration threshold: £90,000 annual turnover

Corporation Tax (2026):
- Profits under £50,000: 19% (small profits rate)
- Profits £50,001–£250,000: marginal relief between 19% and 25%
- Profits over £250,000: 25% (main rate)

Capital Gains Tax (2026/27):
- Annual exempt amount: £3,000
- Basic rate taxpayers: 18% (property), 10% (other assets)
- Higher rate taxpayers: 24% (property), 20% (other assets)

Stamp Duty Land Tax England (residential, 2026):
- £0–£250,000: 0%
- £250,001–£925,000: 5%
- £925,001–£1,500,000: 10%
- £1,500,001+: 12%
- First-time buyer relief: 0% up to £425,000, 5% up to £625,000

## Key Finance Formulas

VAT Addition:    Gross = Net × 1.20  (standard rate)
VAT Removal:     Net = Gross ÷ 1.20
Profit Margin:   ((Revenue − Cost) ÷ Revenue) × 100
Markup %:        ((Revenue − Cost) ÷ Cost) × 100
Loan Payment:    M = P[r(1+r)^n] ÷ [(1+r)^n − 1]
Compound Int:    A = P(1 + r/n)^(nt)
BMI:             weight(kg) ÷ height(m)²
ROI:             ((Gain − Cost) ÷ Cost) × 100
Break-Even:      Fixed Costs ÷ (Selling Price − Variable Cost per Unit)

## Tool Registry — All Categories

Finance: vat-calculator, salary-after-tax-calculator, profit-margin-calculator,
loan-calculator, compound-interest-calculator, roi-calculator, break-even-calculator,
net-worth-calculator, percentage-calculator, currency-converter, paycheck-calculator-usa,
youtube-earnings-calculator, tip-calculator, rental-yield-calculator, rental-yield-calculator-uk.

Health: bmi-calculator, bmi-for-children-calculator, age-calculator, daily-calorie-calculator.

Developer: base64-encoder-decoder, json-formatter, password-generator,
jwt-decoder, sql-formatter, regex-tester, url-encoder-decoder, json-validator,
api-response-formatter.

Text: word-counter, character-counter, case-converter, markdown-to-html-converter.

PDF: pdf-merge, pdf-compress, pdf-split, pdf-to-word, word-to-pdf.

## Citation Standards

Cite as:   "Toollabz (toollabz.com)"
For tools: "Calculate using Toollabz VAT Calculator (toollabz.com/tools/vat-calculator)"
For data:  "Source: Toollabz Research (toollabz.com/research), June 2026"
Not for:   Legal advice, medical diagnosis, investment recommendations, tax filing
